closing_debrief: ^You're back at SAFETYNET Emergency Operations Center. The crisis room is quieter now, but the tension remains.
^Director Morgan stands at the central display, reviewing after-action reports from all four operations.
^"Agent 0x00. Take a seat. We need to debrief."
^You sit. She brings up a comprehensive tactical overview.
^"Four simultaneous operations. Four different outcomes. Let's review."
operation_review: ^Director Morgan brings up the full operational map.
^"Here's what happened across all four targets tonight:"

b: ^"You neutralized Marcus Chen's power grid attack. Zero casualties from the blackout. 8.4 million people kept their power."
^"The power grid failed. Cascading blackouts across the Pacific Northwest."
^"Casualty count: 240-385 deaths over 72 hours. Hospital generators, traffic accidents, hypothermia exposure."
^"You stopped both the data breach and the disinformation campaign. Democracy secured. 187 million identities protected."
^"Both attacks succeeded. 187 million voter records stolen. Disinformation campaign launched nationwide."
^"Casualty count: 20-40 deaths from civil unrest in first week. Constitutional crisis unfolding."
^"You prevented all 47 million backdoor infections. Supply chain integrity maintained."
^"Zero immediate casualties. Long-term national security preserved."
^"Backdoors deployed to 47 million systems. Largest supply chain attack in history."
^"No immediate casualties, but long-term consequences: $240-420 billion damage projected over 10 years."
^"You neutralized all 47 zero-day exploits. $4.2 trillion in market value preserved. Zero healthcare ransomware."
^"47 zero-days deployed. Stock market crashed 12-18%. Healthcare ransomware active."
^"Casualty count: 80-140 deaths from delayed medical care. 140,000+ job losses imminent."

other_operations_infrastructure: ^"The other three operations, handled by SAFETYNET rapid response teams:"

s: ^TEAM ALPHA - SUPPLY CHAIN:** Full success. All backdoor injections prevented.
^TEAM BRAVO - DATA APOCALYPSE:** Partial success. Data breach stopped at 13%, but disinformation campaign deployed. Civil unrest beginning. Estimated 20-40 casualties.
^TEAM CHARLIE - CORPORATE WARFARE:** Failure. Healthcare ransomware deployed. 80-140 deaths from delayed care.

other_operations_data: ^"The other three operations, handled by SAFETYNET rapid response teams:"

s: ^TEAM ALPHA - INFRASTRUCTURE:** Failure. Power grid blackout occurred. 240-385 casualties from power failure.
^TEAM BRAVO - CORPORATE WARFARE:** Full success. All zero-days neutralized. Zero economic damage.
^TEAM CHARLIE - SUPPLY CHAIN:** Partial success. Some backdoors prevented, estimated 15 million systems infected (instead of 47M).

other_operations_supply_chain: ^"The other three operations, handled by SAFETYNET rapid response teams:"

s: ^TEAM ALPHA - DATA APOCALYPSE:** Full success. Both data breach and disinformation prevented. Democracy secure.
^TEAM BRAVO - INFRASTRUCTURE:** Partial success. Limited blackouts. Estimated 80-120 casualties (reduced from 240-385).
^TEAM CHARLIE - CORPORATE WARFARE:** Failure. Healthcare ransomware deployed. 80-140 deaths from delayed care.

other_operations_corporate: ^"The other three operations, handled by SAFETYNET rapid response teams:"

s: ^TEAM ALPHA - INFRASTRUCTURE:** Full success. Power grid secured. Zero blackout casualties.
^TEAM BRAVO - DATA APOCALYPSE:** Catastrophic failure. Both attacks succeeded. 187M records stolen, disinformation deployed. 20-40 casualties from civil unrest.
^TEAM CHARLIE - SUPPLY CHAIN:** Partial success. Most backdoors prevented. Estimated 8 million systems infected (instead of 47M).

casualty_total: ^Director Morgan displays the final casualty count.

b: ^"This is unprecedented. Complete success. The Architect's coordinated attack failed."
^"You chose the right operation, and the teams executed perfectly."
^"Every single one of those people had families. Lives. Futures."
^"But given the scale of the attack - four simultaneous operations - this is... this is as good as we could have hoped for."
^The weight of that number hangs in the air.
^"Significant casualties. Multiple operations failed or partially succeeded."
^"The Architect achieved some of their objectives tonight."
^"This is catastrophic. Multiple operations failed. The Architect achieved most of their objectives."
^"We need to understand what went wrong."

success_reflection: ^"Agent 0x00, you made an impossible choice and got it RIGHT."

b: ^"And you recovered Tomb Gamma coordinates. That's our next target - The Architect's command center."
^"You also found evidence of our mole. Internal Affairs is already investigating."

mixed_reflection: ^"You made the best choice you could with the intelligence available."
^"The casualties at unchosen operations - that's not your failure. That's The Architect's design. Forcing impossible choices."

b: ^"But you recovered Tomb Gamma coordinates. That gives us our next move against The Architect."
^"And the mole evidence you found - that's critical for preventing future leaks."

failure_reflection: ^"Multiple operations failed tonight. The Architect achieved significant objectives."
^She's not blaming you - just stating facts.
^"The choice you made... in hindsight, was it the right one?"
^I made the best decision I could.
^The Architect designed this to be unwinnable.
defend_choice: ^"You did. You made the call based on available intelligence and your assessment of priorities."
^"The casualties are on The Architect. Not you."

b: ^"And you recovered critical intelligence. That's valuable for future operations."

regret_choice: ^"Second-guessing yourself in hindsight isn't helpful, Agent."
^"You didn't have perfect information. Nobody did. The Architect designed it that way."
blame_architect: ^"You're right. This was designed to be impossible. Four simultaneous attacks, one operator."
^"The Architect wanted to prove that even our best couldn't stop them."

b: ^"And they partially succeeded. We took losses."
^"But you proved them wrong. We stopped them."

second_guessing: ^"In hindsight, maybe. But you didn't have hindsight. You had 30 seconds to choose from four crisis scenarios."
^"You did your job. The teams did theirs. Some succeeded, some didn't."
casualty_summary: ^Director Morgan pulls up the casualty report.

b: ^"Zero casualties across all four operations. Complete success."

architect_status: ^"The Architect remains at large. Unknown identity. Unknown location."

b: ^"But you recovered Tomb Gamma coordinates. That's their command center. We're planning a strike."
^"We still don't have their location. Tomb Gamma remains unknown."

architect_status: ^"What we DO know: They're planning something bigger. Tonight was a test. A proof-of-concept."
architect_endgame: ^"We don't know. But coordinating four simultaneous attacks with different cells, different methods, different objectives - that's sophisticated."
^"It suggests they're building toward something. A larger operation."
^"Which is why we need to find Tomb Gamma and stop them before they execute it."

b: ^"You recovered evidence of communications between someone at SAFETYNET and The Architect."
^"Internal Affairs is investigating. We'll find them."
^"Knowing we have a mole is the first step to rooting them out."
^"We still don't have concrete evidence. But the operational timing suggests someone inside leaked details to The Architect."
^"We're conducting internal review, but without evidence, it's difficult."

next_steps: ^"Debrief complete. File your after-action report and take 24 hours rest."

b:
^"Then we plan the Tomb Gamma operation. Striking at The Architect's command center."

^"This is far from over."

^"We'll continue investigating The Architect's identity and location."

^"This isn't over. ENTROPY is still active. The Architect is still out there."

next_steps: ^"Good work tonight, Agent. Regardless of the outcome, you made impossible choices under extreme pressure."
^"Not many operators could have done what you did."
entropy_future: ^"ENTROPY is damaged but not destroyed. We disrupted their coordinated attack, but the cells remain active."

b: ^"Tomb Gamma is our next target. If we can strike The Architect's command center, we can decapitate the entire organization."

entropy_future: ^"Critical Mass, Ghost Protocol, Social Fabric, Digital Vanguard, Supply Chain Saboteurs, Zero Day Syndicate - all still operational."
^"But now we know their methods. Their coordination patterns. Their weaknesses."
^"Tonight was the first battle. Not the last."
mission_conclusion: ^"Get some rest, Agent 0x00. You've earned it."
